services.title: Remote Tech Support
services.headline: Remote help for everyday computer and software problems.
services.summary: Remote help for software problems, settings, printers, email, and everyday computer issues once your support plan is in place.

services.title: Remote Virus & Malware Removal
services.headline: Remote malware cleanup when secure access is already in place.
services.summary: Remote help cleaning up pop-ups, browser hijacks, spyware, and similar infections when secure access is already in place through your support plan.

services.title: 1-on-1 Remote Tech Training
services.headline: Beginner-friendly online training for everyday tech confidence.
services.summary: Private online training for everyday computer, phone, internet, and online-safety skills, with patient guidance for beginners, seniors, and families.

services.title: Remote Security Assessment
services.headline: A guided security review for local clients with a support plan.
services.summary: Review devices, accounts, browser settings, updates, and backups to spot weak points and clean up the basics.

services.title: Privacy Hardening & Digital Safety
services.headline: Remote privacy help for local clients with a support plan.
services.summary: Tighten browsers, messaging apps, DNS, VPN settings, and device privacy controls through a guided remote session.

services.title: Remote IT & Cybersecurity Tutoring
services.headline: Focused one-on-one help for specific tech topics.
services.summary: Live remote guidance for students and career changers who want help with a class, project, lab, or specific skill area.
